name: road-trip-runner
description: Road Trip Runner mobile app shell.

scripts.app:sync: npm run app:prepare && cap sync android
scripts.app:android: npm run app:prepare && cap open android
scripts.app:build:android: npm run app:sync && cd android && JAVA_HOME=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.app:install:android: npm run app:sync && cd android && JAVA_HOME=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home ./gradlew installDebug
